name: Honey-Mustard Dressing Djbx41b
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine mayonnaise, white vinegar, sugar, onion powder, and Grey Poupon mustard.
2. Whisk until well blended.
3. Gradually add in the honey and parsley, whisking continuously.
4. Transfer the dressing to an airtight container and chill for at least 1 hour before serving.
